title: Pseudolaelia canaanensis
taxonomy: Pseudolaelia canaanensis is classified as a species within the genus Pseudolaelia, a group of orchids. The genus Pseudolaelia is part of the subtribe Cymbidiinae, which contains several other orchid genera. The Cymbidiinae subtribe is a part of the tribe Cymbidieae, a large and diverse group of orchids. The tribe Cymbidieae is within the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is one of the largest subfamilies of orchids. This classification places Pseudolaelia canaanensis within the orchid family, Orchidaceae.
